Lumify
Table of Contents

Namespace lumify.api.Models.DTO.Requests

Classes

AddEventRequest

Request body for creating a calendar event (see AddEvent(AddEventRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddFolderRequest

Request body for creating a folder (see AddFolder(AddFolderRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddLinkItemRequest

Request body for adding a link item module to a note (see AddLinkItem(AddLinkItemRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddNoteRequest

Request body for creating a note (see AddNote(AddNoteRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddTextBlockRequest

Request body for adding a text block module to a note (see AddTextBlock(AddTextBlockRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddTodoEntryRequest

Request body for adding an entry to a todo list (see AddTodoEntry(AddTodoEntryRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddTodoListRequest

Request body for creating a todo list (see AddTodoList(AddTodoListRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddWorkspaceMemberRequest

Request body for adding a member to a workspace (see AddWorkspaceMember(AddWorkspaceMemberRequest, CancellationToken)).

AddWorkspaceRequest

Request body for creating a workspace (see AddWorkspace(AddWorkspaceRequest, CancellationToken)).

LoginRequest

Request body for login (see LoginUser(LoginRequest)).

RegisterRequest

Request body for registration (see RegisterUser(RegisterRequest, CancellationToken)).

RequestPasswordResetRequest

Request body for requesting a password reset link (see RequestPasswordReset(RequestPasswordResetRequest, CancellationToken)).

ResendVerificationRequest

Request body for resending an e-mail verification link (see ResendVerification(ResendVerificationRequest, CancellationToken)).

ResetPasswordRequest

Request body for setting a new password via a reset link (see ResetPassword(ResetPasswordRequest, CancellationToken)).

SaveEventRequest

Request body for updating an event (see SaveEvent(SaveEventRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

SaveFolderRequest

Request body for updating a folder (see SaveFolder(SaveFolderRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update); an empty parent moves to the root.

SaveNoteRequest

Request body for updating a note (see SaveNote(SaveNoteRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update); an empty folder moves to the root.

SaveTextblockRequest

Request body for updating a text block module (see SaveTextBlock(SaveTextblockRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

SaveTodoListRequest

Request body for updating a todo list (see SaveTodoList(SaveTodoListRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

SaveUserProfileRequest

Request body for updating the current user's profile (see SaveUserProfile(SaveUserProfileRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied; empty values clear the respective field.

SaveWorkspaceRequest

Request body for renaming a workspace (see SaveWorkspace(SaveWorkspaceRequest, CancellationToken)). Only non-null fields are applied (partial update).

TotpCodeRequest

Request body carrying a single TOTP code, used to confirm 2FA setup and to disable it again (see ConfirmTotp(TotpCodeRequest) / DisableTotp(TotpCodeRequest)).

VerifyEmailRequest

Request body for confirming an e-mail address (see VerifyEmail(VerifyEmailRequest, CancellationToken)).

VerifyTotpLoginRequest

Request body for the second login step with 2FA (see VerifyTotpLogin(VerifyTotpLoginRequest)).

Made with docfx
